dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system achieved 100% schema validation success across both critical reasoning spans. The rules-context-loader generated an exceptionally high completion volume (64,255 tokens), indicating a comprehensive and compliant ingestion of architectural constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Strong causal mapping was evident in the signal-to-pattern-proposals phase. While the total token count for this trace (106,159) is slightly lower than the baseline (116,380), the depth of the context loader ensures a high-fidelity causal foundation for the proposals.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment and proposal generation phase processed 33,486 tokens, exceeding the baseline's alignment processing volume of 31,181. This indicates a more intensive evaluation of architectural trade-offs and pattern suitability than the reference trace.
